text: In "The Obesity Code," Dr. Jason Fung challenges conventional wisdom about weight loss, revealing that the key to understanding obesity lies in hormones, particularly insulin. Through his compelling insights, he unveils a groundbreaking theory that highlights the critical role of insulin resistance in weight gain. Dr. Fung offers readers five essential steps to adopt lifelong habits that not only enhance overall health but also effectively regulate insulin levels. Moreover, he explores the transformative power of intermittent fasting as a strategy to break free from insulin resistance and achieve sustainable weight loss. This engaging book provides a fresh perspective on nutrition and empowers readers to take control of their

Dr. Jason Fung is a Canadian nephrologist and a leading expert in the field of intermittent fasting and weight management, best known for his influential work, "The Obesity Code." With a medical degree from the University of Toronto and extensive clinical experience, Dr. Fung has dedicated his career to understanding the complexities of obesity and diabetes, challenging traditional dietary approaches. He is the co-founder of the Intensive Dietary Management (IDM) program, which advocates for a low-carbohydrate, high-fat diet alongside fasting protocols to promote sustainable weight loss and improve metabolic health. Through his research and writings, Dr. Fung has emerged as a prominent voice in the conversation about obesity, helping to empower individuals with practical strategies to regain control
